CustomField.description: Specifies the calculation method used for this tactic.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select a method. * Dynamic: Multiplies the accrual amount by the actual daily volume. * Lump Sum (Effective Date): Allocates the entire accrual amount to the start date of the accrual rule measure, defined in the KPI definition time scope. * Lump Sum (Equal Daily Distribution): Distributes the accrual amount equally across a defined date range.
CustomField.label: Calculation Method
